rationale: Both correctly diagnose the config/tokenizer mismatch and cite the same crash site (hunyuan_image3.py:1561-1563), matching the thread's root cause and workaround. X goes further with grounded detail (yaml header citations, downstream _all_ratio_ids handling) and correctly infers the disposition — Gaohan123's request to move tracking to a new issue implies this bug report itself is resolved, which X states explicitly. Y adds an unverified third config row (hunyuan_image3_ar.yaml) not established anywhere in the thread and marks disposition 'keep-open', which contradicts the thread's clear resolution/workaround-plus-spinoff pattern.
